subcodes.first_line: The manifest verses have, beyond any doubt, been sent down from the presence of One All-Knowing, All-Wise. Whoso doubteth is verily among the most remote of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیات بینات لا ریب انها نزلت من لدن علیم حکیم من ارتاب انه من ابعد الخلق کذلک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
